hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "fetch\s*\(.*(/rest/v1/|supabase\.co)" 2>/dev/null; then echo "BLOCK: Use supaFetch/supaGet/supaRpc from src/lib/supaFetch.ts — raw fetch bypasses KROMI JWT and RLS fails. See CLAUDE.md conventions." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "supabase\.storage|from.*storage-js" 2>/dev/null; then echo "BLOCK: Use KromiFileStore.uploadFile() from src/services/storage/KromiFileStore.ts — never Supabase Storage directly. Backend is Google Drive." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "navigator\.bluetooth" 2>/dev/null && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "components/|pages/|hooks/" 2>/dev/null; then echo "BLOCK: BLE access must go through GiantBLEService — never navigator.bluetooth in components/hooks." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "auth\.uid\(\)" 2>/dev/null; then echo "BLOCK: KROMI uses kromi_uid() not auth.uid() — we have custom JWT, not Supabase Auth. See CLAUDE.md Auth section." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git push" 2>/dev/null; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true; echo "[CI/CD] Pre-push check: running type-check + build..." >&2; npm run type-check 2>&1 | tail -5; TC=$?; if [ $TC -ne 0 ]; then echo "BLOCK: TypeScript errors found. Fix before pushing." >&2; exit 2; fi; npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; BD=$?; if [ $BD -ne 0 ]; then echo "BLOCK: Build failed. Fix before pushing." >&2; exit 2; fi; echo "[CI/CD] type-check + build passed. Push allowed." >&2; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "gradlew.*assemble" 2>/dev/null; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true; LATEST_TAG=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$LATEST_TAG" ]; then echo "BLOCK: No git tag found. APK versioning requires a tag. Run: git tag vX.Y.Z" >&2; exit 2; fi; echo "[APK] Building from tag $LATEST_TAG" >&2; fi'
bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "npm run build" 2>/dev/null; then echo "Build completed. Check for TypeScript errors above." >&2; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git push.*main|git push.*origin" 2>/dev/null; then echo "" >&2; echo "=== DEPLOY STATUS ===">&2; echo "PWA: Vercel auto-deploys from main. Check https://vercel.com/dashboard" >&2; echo "APK: If needed, tag first (git tag vX.Y.Z) then build (cd ble-bridge-android && ./gradlew assembleDebug)" >&2; echo "Edge Functions: Deploy separately via Supabase MCP (mcp__claude_ai_Supabase__deploy_edge_function)" >&2; echo "====================" >&2; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "gradlew.*assemble" 2>/dev/null && [ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_EXIT_CODE" = "0" ] 2>/dev/null; then TAG=$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null); echo "" >&2; echo "=== APK BUILD SUCCESS ===" >&2; echo "APK at: ble-bridge-android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk" >&2; echo "To release: gh release create $TAG ble-bridge-android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk" >&2; echo "========================" >&2; fi'

bash -c 'echo "" >&2; echo "========================================" >&2; echo "  SESSION WRAP-UP OBRIGATORIO" >&2; echo "========================================" >&2; echo "" >&2; echo "Antes de terminar, executa o checklist:" >&2; echo "" >&2; echo "1. CLAUDE.md — Actualizar se:" >&2; echo "   - Novo ficheiro/servico/store criado" >&2; echo "   - Convencao alterada ou adicionada" >&2; echo "   - Nova tabela/edge function/RLS policy" >&2; echo "   - Estrutura do projecto mudou" >&2; echo "" >&2; echo "2. Memory — Guardar se aprendeste algo novo:" >&2; echo "   - Feedback do utilizador (correccoes, preferencias)" >&2; echo "   - Decisoes de arquitectura nao obvias" >&2; echo "   - Referencias externas descobertas" >&2; echo "   - Bugs encontrados e como foram resolvidos" >&2; echo "" >&2; echo "3. kromi-doc — Se houve commits, verificar:" >&2; echo "   - git hooks estao instalados (auto-sync)" >&2; echo "   - Se nao, lembrar o utilizador" >&2; echo "" >&2; echo "Le .claude/skills/15-session-documentation.md" >&2; echo "para o processo completo." >&2; echo "========================================" >&2'
